_comment: VS Code MCP Configuration for ZombieCoder
_usage_local: Place in .vscode/mcp.json at your project root OR use MCP: Open User Configuration from Command Palette
_usage_remote: When using the cloud bridge at g.zombiecoder.my.id
_feature_ssot: Auto-creates .zombiecoder/SSOT.md on connect via MCP initialize — no manual setup needed
_note_vscode_format: Official VS Code MCP config uses root key 'servers' (NOT 'mcpServers'). HTTP type uses 'type' + 'url'. Stdio uses 'command' + 'args'. See: https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/reference/mcp-configuration

zombiecoder-remote._description: Connect to ZombieCoder cloud bridge — SSOT auto-initialized, per-session RAG isolated

zombiecoder-local._description: Connect to local ZombieCoder bridge (requires: npm start)

zombiecoder-stdio._description: Spawn MCP server directly from source (standalone mode)
